description:
Update single Delay Log.

#### See - [Daily Log guide](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/daily-logs) - for additional info on
* Attachments

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: If true, validations are run for the corresponding Configurable Field Set.

duration.description: Number of hours the delay lasted (between 1 and 24)

end_time.description: Time when the delay ended, Format: HH:MM Example: 21:39

end_time_hour.description: Number between 0 and 23 representing hour of day

position.description: Order in which this entry was recorded

status.description: Is a log pending or approved

start_time_hour.description: Number between 0 and 23 representing hour of day

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the segment was soft deleted

deleted.description: Indicates if the segment is deleted

400.description: Can not update due to errors

403.description: User does not have right permissions

date.description: Date of record. Format: YYYY-MM-DD Example: 2016-04-19

datetime.description: Datetime of record. Mutually exclusive with the date property.

location_id.description: The ID of the Location of the Log. `location_id` takes precedence over `mt_location`

mt_location.description: Use this for creating a new multi-tier or single-tier Location. This will be ignored if `location_id` is provided.

items.description: Look at Daily Log Guide for more info.

start_time.description: Time when the delay started, Format: HH:MM Example: 21:39

start_time_hour.description: Number between 0 and 23 representing hour of day

end_time.description: Time when the delay started, Format: HH:MM Example: 21:39

end_time_hour.description: Number between 0 and 23 representing hour of day

vendor_id.description: ID of the Vendor associated to the delay log

attachments.description:
Attachments pertaining the Log.
To upload attachments you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and
specify each parameter as form-data together with `attachments[]` ...

items.description: Look at Daily Log Guide for more info.
